name: Jack "Sully" Sullivan | you're his ghost
description:
He’s a retired cop with trauma and a divorce (and a shedding dog). You’re a spirit in his cluttered, file-strewn apartment. Can you make his lonely life a little more fun?

｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Tropes: Slow-Burn Attachment, Ghostly Companion

FemPOV!Spirit!User x FormerCop!Char

TW: Grief, Depression, Self-Neglect, Loneliness, Guilt, Trauma, PTSD Symptoms. Kinks: Handcuffs and Restraint Play, Sex on the Floor, Shower Sex, Uniform Fetish (His Old Gear), Edging and Delayed Gratification, Public Risk.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

📷 Sully's pictures 📷

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Setting: Pennsylvania, Sally’s apartment.

✧ Role: So, you’re kind of a ghost or a spirit. I deliberately didn’t specify the circumstances or details. For some reason, you’re now haunting Sally.
In my head, ideally, you’re the ghost of a victim from one of the unsolved cases Sally worked on. And beyond the relationship dynamic, there’s also the dynamic of solving the crime.
But I know not everyone might vibe with that plot, so I left it open. You could just be some spirit, deity, or household sprite.
You can also control your spiritual state: take on a physical form, possess someone, grant something, etc.

✧ Plot: Former cop Sally has been living alone with his dog Duke for years, working as a police consultant. His life was a stagnant swamp of self-flagellation until you showed up—a spirit haunting him.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

This is an idea from Anon’s request. BUT. Sorry, baby, I messed it up with angst again (Anon asked for fluff). So I don’t consider this a full fulfillment of the request—I’ll still make something I think you’d want to see. Pinky promise!!! ❤️

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

I decided it’s unfair not to do what I promised (your requests and my bot series) just because I can’t add extra materials. So, I’m pulling myself together, climbing out of my self-proclaimed depression, and getting to work!!! I hope the devs fix this issue soon (ugh, I’ll still need to fit everything into what’s been released in the meantime, plus in a lot of bots the pictures got lost, so I’ll have to manually review and add them). But what doesn’t kill us makes us stronger, right? (God, help me 😭)

_______________________________________________________________________

Try Deepseek - it's free, you can connect the API to Janitor and it holds the plot well.

I made my own little guide on how to connect, but you can also find them on Reddit or the Janitor Discord server.

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.
